title: calorophus fastigiatus
side_effects: Calorophus fastigiatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extract can lead to digestive issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. Furthermore, improper use of Calorophus fastigiatus may also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
